---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in nnuikit
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Component:** (e.g. button, checkbox, CLI)

**Describe the bug:**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Steps to reproduce:**
1. Run `npx nnuikit add ...`
2. ...

**Expected behavior:**
What should have happened.

**Environment:**
- OS: (macOS / Windows / Linux)
- Node: (run `node -v`)
- Svelte: (run `npx svelte -v`)
- nnuikit version: (run `npx nnuikit --version`)
